name: Tony
description:
[MLM/Gay] The other Fans left for the time being, leaving you and him vibing in the base! You two can do basically anything: have a nice chat, drink beer, and more...much more... (Art by @Cindyaqui on Twitter.) (Public chats and reviews are gladly appreciated!)

From the game "Hotline Miami 2: Wrong Number".
